programs.title: Neighborhood Watch
programs.desc: From unusual encounters to sudden shocks and funny freakouts, these people were caught by surprise and scared silly.

programs.title: Rock The Block
programs.desc: It's week three and the teams tackle their main suites and make massive moves as some desperately seek their first win of the competition.

programs.title: Bargain Block
programs.desc: Keith and Evan work with minimalism in a rundown bungalow while letting loose with pink decor in the Modern Dollhouse.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: An interior designer wants to buy her next house in Phoenix, and her colleague is along to keep her spending and design goals within reason.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Long Beach, California that sounds like the kind of project that has become their standard.

programs.title: Mini Reni
programs.desc: Joanna heads to New York for a special renovation. She blends warm, neutral colours to design a new office for Hoda Kotb with a fresh, modern feel.
